title: sorghum fuscum
intro: Sorghum fuscum, also known as black sorghum, is a plant species belonging to the grass family Poaceae, native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Sorghum fuscum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Sorghum fuscum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
